response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior full-stack engineer with strong breadth across JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, plus solid software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD). However, this role demands deep JVM, Kotlin, and Spring ecosystem expertise alongside genuine interest in IDE internals — areas where the resume shows only peripheral Java exposure (robotic arms work at Altom, brief C/C++ at NI on LabWindows/CVI) and no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience. The closest IDE-adjacent work (NI LabWindows/CVI) was over a decade ago and in C, not JVM tooling.
strengths: Proven senior IC track record at large-scale companies with complex codebases
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Prior C/C++ IDE component work at National Instruments shows tooling affinity
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Kotlin not listed in skills; Java exposure appears limited and dated
No evidence of deep JVM internals or modern language-tooling work

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering maturity and craftsmanship practices
